name: Impossible Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 15 inches.
3. Sprinkle 3/8 cup onion and 1/3 cup Parmesan cheese in the pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat together milk, eggs, and Bisquick for 15 seconds on high.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
7. Spread pizza sauce over the top.
8. Top with remaining ingredients.
9. Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes or until cheese is lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
For half recipe:
Use a 1 quart square or round casserole dish.
Decrease Parmesan cheese to 2 tablespoons, eggs to 2, and Bisquick to 1/2 cup.
Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half.
Reduce blending time to 10 seconds and baking time to 10-15 minutes.
